llm_response: i am writing to formally request a raise based on my consistent performance over the past year. my dedication has allowed me to deliver significant value to the company while taking on additional responsibilities that were not part of my original role. these expanded duties have further demonstrated the value to the company by improving our overall operational efficiency. i believe that adjusting my compensation will reflect the current scope of my work and the results I have achieved. please let me know when we can discuss this matter further regarding my performance and future contributions.
